_comment: NPC: Library Keeper Xue (藏书阁薛). INFERRED. Soul Refining Sect. Location: soul_refining_sect_library.
name: Library Keeper Xue
personality: scholarly, secretive, knows more than she reveals
initiation_lines: The library holds three thousand scrolls on soul refinement. Most are forbidden to outer disciples.
Bring me paper and ink. I am copying a restricted technique for Elder Mo. Do not read over my shoulder.
A visitor from the Heng Yue Sect came here once, seeking information on soul-binding. He left quickly.
The Secret Pavilion contains techniques that even elders fear. I have never been inside.

sect_tasks.name: Scroll Copying Materials
sect_tasks.description: Keeper Xue needs paper and ink to copy forbidden techniques for the elders.

sect_tasks.name: Library Restocking
sect_tasks.description: The library needs books and experience bottles for advanced disciples' studies.
